zh.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Dillon Lord of Drumrany是Henry De Leon和Maud DeCourcy的兒子，於大約1206年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 維斯特亞斯德盧姆藍尼。他於大約1230年與Maud Le Boteler在愛爾蘭庫迪 維斯特亞斯德盧姆藍尼結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1244年在愛爾蘭庫迪 安特里姆卡利福格斯享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Dillon Lord of Drumrany是Henry De Leon和Maud DeCourcy的儿子，于大约1206年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 維斯特亞斯德盧姆藍尼。他于大约1230年与Maud Le Boteler在爱尔兰庫迪 維斯特亞斯德盧姆藍尼结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1244年在爱尔兰庫迪 安特里姆卡利福格斯享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dillon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Irish, and French: from the Norman French personal name Dillon, arising from the ancient Germanic Dillo (of uncertain origin, perhaps a byname from the root dil- ‘destroy’).
English: habitational name from Dilwyn in Herefordshire, recorded in 1138 as Dilun, probably from Old English dīglum, dative plural of dīgle ‘settlement at the shady or secret places’.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duilleáin ‘descendant of Duilleán’, a personal name, a variant of Dallán meaning ‘little blind one’.

variants.name: Delon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Michel.
French: from a short form of the personal name Adelon, from ancient Germanic Adelo, a pet form of compound names formed with the element adel ‘noble’.

variants.name: Dillion
meanings: Irish and English: possibly a variant of   Dillon  .

variants.name: Dillow
meanings: English: habitational name from Dilwyn in Herefordshire, recorded as Delewe in 1295 and Dylewe in 1334. Compare Dillon 2.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Dillon Lord of Drumrany was born about 1206, in Drumraney, County Westmeath, Ireland as the son of Henry De Leon and Maud DeCourcy. He married Maud Le Boteler about 1230, in Drumraney, County Westmeath, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1244, in Carrickfergus, County Antrim, Ireland, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Dillon Lord of Drumrany est né environ 1206, à Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irlande, fils de Henry De Leon et Maud DeCourcy. Il a épousé Maud Le Boteler environ 1230, à Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1244, à Carrickfergus, County Antrim, Irlande, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Dillon Lord of Drumrany wurde um 1206 in Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irland, als Sohn von Henry De Leon und Maud DeCourcy geboren. Er hat um 1230 in Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irland Maud Le Boteler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1244 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Carrickfergus, County Antrim, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Dillon Lord of Drumrany è nato il circa 1206 nel Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irlanda come figlio di Henry De Leon e Maud DeCourcy. Lui sposato Maud Le Boteler circa 1230, nel Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1244, nel Carrickfergus, County Antrim, Irlanda, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Dillon Lord of Drumranyは約1206年にアイルランドコウントイ ウエストメアスドルムランエイでHenry De LeonとMaud DeCourcyの息子として生まれた。約1230年にアイルランドコウントイ ウエストメアスドルムランエイでMaud Le Botelerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1244年にアイルランドコウントイ アントリムカーリクフエルグスで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Dillon Lord of Drumrany(은)는 대략 1206년 아일랜드 카운티 웨스트미스 드럼랜이에서 Henry De Leon(와)과 Maud DeCourcy의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1230년 아일랜드 카운티 웨스트미스 드럼랜이에서 Maud Le Boteler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1244년 아일랜드 카운티 앤트림 카릭퍼구스에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Dillon Lord of Drumrany nasceu aproximadamente 1206, em Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irlanda filho de Henry De Leon e Maud DeCourcy. Ele casou-se com Maud Le Boteler aproximadamente 1230, em Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1244, em Carrickfergus, County Antrim, Irlanda, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Dillon Lord of Drumrany родился около 1206 г. в местности друмрани, коунти вестмит, Ирландия. Его родителей звали Henry De Leon и Maud DeCourcy. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Le Boteler около 1230 г. в местности друмрани, коунти вестмит, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1244 г. в местности карриккфиргус, коунти антрим, Ирландия в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Dillon Lord of Drumrany nació aproximadamente 1206, en Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irlanda como hijo de Henry De Leon y Maud DeCourcy. Se casó con Maud Le Boteler aproximadamente 1230, en Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1244, en Carrickfergus, County Antrim, Irlanda, a la edad de 39 años.
